name: bisq-dev-tools
description: AI contributor workflows, skills, and review guidance for Bisq development.

interface.shortDescription: AI workflows for high-quality Bisq contributions
interface.longDescription: Codex and Claude Code skills for Bisq contributors working on Java, JavaFX, P2P networking, Bitcoin transaction safety, DAO governance, pull request review, and commit quality.
defaultPrompt: Use $bisq-contributor-workflow to implement a Bisq issue safely.
Use $bisq-pr-reviewer to review a Bisq pull request.
Use $bisq2-javafx-ui to implement a Bisq2 JavaFX UI change.
